---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a feature for ultrapilot
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? Why is it needed?

## Proposed solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives considered

What other approaches did you consider? Why is this one better?

## Use case

A concrete example of how this would be used. Include the user prompt, the agent's expected behavior, and the expected output.

## Impact

- Which phase(s) does this affect? (goals, explore, plan, build, verify, review, patch, audit)
- Does it change the public API? (SKILL.md frontmatter, command surface, script CLI)
- Does it require a state-machine change? (new phase, new transition)
